channel.title: Posts on Hambaobao
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Hambaobao

item.title: Post Test 1
item.description: Heading 1 Paragraphs are separated by a blank line. 2nd paragraph. Italic, bold, monospace. Itemized lists look like: this one that one the other one Note that — not considering the asterisk — the actual text content starts at 3-columns in. Block quotes are written like so. They can span multiple paragraphs, if you like. With smartyPants set to true in the markdown module configuration, you can format your content smartly:
